subcodes.first_line: O thou who art aflame with the fire of the love of God! We hear that thou hast within thy being a blazing fire, and that thy soul, even as the winged moth, is consumed by its flame
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبت الله از قرار مسموع آتشی افروخته داری و جانی چون پروانه بال
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
